own_review_points: New SchemaGeneratorConfigCustomizer interface has no ordering/priority contract unlike sibling @All filter interfaces (ToolFilter etc.)
Jackson customizer enables RESPECT_JSONPROPERTY_ORDER/REQUIRED by default (@WithDefault true) — behavioral change once jackson module is on classpath
Docs index.adoc:568 has stray word 'server' and an unbalanced backtick on the module names
Victools module classes instantiated via new JacksonModule(...) etc. — possible missing ReflectiveClassBuildItem for native image (pre-existing surface, extended here)
Test base now disables all three schema-generator modules in defaultConfig() — addresses the human-reference review comment about swagger2
notes: Human ref's single point (add swagger2.enabled=false in McpServerTest) is ALREADY satisfied in the final diff (all three disabled at lines 46-48), so not a miss. v8 point1 (ordering doc gap) good/grounded. point2 (default-on Jackson options behavioral change) good. point3 (reflection/native) good and properly hedged as pre-existing. point4 docs: stray 'server' word + missing backtick both verified in index.adoc = good. point5 (test disables modules) is accurate but praise = trivial. point6 (constructSchemaGenerator CDI order) restates point1 with no new insight = trivial. point on summary = trivial. Solid, accurate, well-grounded review of a feature-add PR with low bug density; nothing fabricated. net=3.
